steps.title: Calculate the unit rate of chopping
steps.content:
The processor chops 12 pounds in 2 minutes. Find the unit rate (pounds per minute):
$$\frac{12}{2} = 6 \text{ pounds per minute}$$

steps.title: Use the unit rate to find the time for 72 pounds
steps.content:
Divide 72 pounds by the unit rate of 6 pounds per minute to find the time needed:
$$\frac{72}{6} = 12 \text{ minutes}$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
